raw_input:
Extract fields from the invoice below into a JSON object. Fields: invoice_number (string), invoice_date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD), due_date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD), total_amount (number, no currency symbol), currency (ISO 4217 code). Output only the JSON object — no prose, no markdown fences.

Invoice text:
"Invoice No. INV-2026-0412
Issued: 18 April 2026
Payment due: 18 May 2026
Total: €1.247,50
Payment terms: Net 30 days"
constraints: no markdown fences, no prose outside JSON
total_amount as a number, not a string
